findings: Asymmetry: The lesion exhibits asymmetry in shape and color distribution.
Border: The border appears irregular and poorly defined.
Color: Multiple colors are present, including shades of brown, black, and possibly a blue-white veil (though less distinct in this image).
Diameter: The lesion appears to be greater than 6mm.
Dermoscopic Structures: The image shows a network of irregular pigment, possibly streaks, and areas of atypical pigment globules or irregular brown structures.
impression: The dermoscopic features (asymmetry, irregular border, multiple colors, diameter > 6mm, atypical pigment network/streaks/globules) are highly suggestive of melanoma.
